input.background: Chapter 16 examined data from an experimental cohort that was part of the NIH-sponsored Women's Health Initiative study. This experimental cohort study involved 16,608 postmenopausal women. Roughly half these women were assigned conjugated estrogens (n1=8506). The remaining subjects (n2=8102) received a placebo. Coronary heart disease, invasive breast cancer, and other adverse outcomes were monitored in the groups on an ongoing basis.
input.question: Monitor coronary heart disease, invasive breast cancer, and other adverse outcomes in the groups on an ongoing basis.

treatment_group.description: The treatment groups in the study, where one group received conjugated estrogens and the other received a placebo.

coronary_heart_disease.description: The occurrence of coronary heart disease as an adverse outcome monitored in the study.

invasive_breast_cancer.description: The occurrence of invasive breast cancer as an adverse outcome monitored in the study.

other_adverse_outcomes.description: Other adverse outcomes monitored in the study.
